negative_memory.reason_not_candidate: activity landed inside the target band, but proxy, closed-bar MT5 logic, aggregate MT5 tick, and fold-isolated MT5 tick evidence did not establish a candidate

supporting_lessons.summary: R0001 produced 0 profitable and 9 losing fold-isolated MT5 tick folds, total tick net PnL -317.02, and worst fold rw_005 net PnL -47.42.
Schedule replay mechanical parity passed with mismatch_count 0, so the weak result is not explained by proxy-vs-MT5 logic mismatch.
Tick execution improved closed-bar logic by 110.39 total net PnL across 9 better and 0 worse folds, but both logic and tick surfaces remained negative.
Native MQL signal logic, ONNX materialization, cost/slippage hardening, final sizing, and historical lineage debt remain unresolved; no stronger claim is created.

required_kpi_summary.remaining_work_classification: no_candidate; further C0064 work would be adjacent threshold, stop, target, hold, session, activity, spread, capital, or polarity-flip-persistence feature nudge tuning

notes: MT5 validation remains mandatory even if proxy KPI is weak.
Schedule replay does not create runtime, materialization, ONNX, promotion, or live authority.
